name: Stone Town
description_sw: Mji Mkongwe ni eneo la kihistoria lenye majengo ya mawe, milango ya Zanzibar, masoko na historia ya biashara ya Bahari ya Hindi.
description_en: Stone Town is a historic area known for coral-stone buildings, carved doors, markets, and Indian Ocean trade history.
tips: Best for walking tour, history, photos, Forodhani evening food market.
keywords: stone town mji mkongwe history heritage old town forodhani

name: Forodhani Gardens
description_sw: Bustani ya Forodhani ni sehemu maarufu kwa chakula cha jioni, mandazi, mishkaki, urojo na vyakula vya baharini.
description_en: Forodhani Gardens is a popular evening food area near the waterfront with local snacks and seafood.
tips: Go in evening; check prices before ordering; good for local food experience.

name: Prison Island
description_sw: Kisiwa cha Prison Island kina historia na kasa wakubwa; pia ni safari fupi ya boti kutoka Stone Town.
description_en: Prison Island is known for history, giant tortoises, and a short boat trip from Stone Town.
tips: Carry sunscreen; negotiate boat fare; combine with snorkeling if weather is good.
keywords: prison island changuu tortoise snorkeling boat

name: Nungwi Beach
description_sw: Nungwi ni fukwe maarufu kaskazini mwa Zanzibar, nzuri kwa kuogelea, machweo na shughuli za baharini.
description_en: Nungwi is a popular northern beach, good for swimming, sunsets, and marine activities.
tips: Good for sunset and beach resorts; check tide and transport time from Stone Town.
keywords: nungwi beach sunset swimming north coast

name: Kendwa Beach
description_sw: Kendwa ni fukwe tulivu karibu na Nungwi, inayojulikana kwa mchanga mweupe na kuogelea.
description_en: Kendwa is a calmer beach near Nungwi known for white sand and swimming.
tips: Good for relaxing; suitable if you want less crowded beach time.

name: Jozani Forest
description_sw: Msitu wa Jozani ni makazi ya kima punju wekundu wa Zanzibar na njia za kutembea kwenye mikoko.
description_en: Jozani Forest is known for Zanzibar red colobus monkeys and mangrove walking trails.
tips: Use a guide; do not feed monkeys; good half-day trip.
keywords: jozani forest red colobus monkeys mangrove nature

name: Paje Beach
description_sw: Paje ni eneo maarufu kwa kitesurfing, mikahawa ya pwani na mandhari ya bahari ya mashariki.
description_en: Paje is popular for kitesurfing, beach cafes, and east-coast ocean views.
tips: Best during good wind season; check tide times for swimming.

name: Jambiani
description_sw: Jambiani ni kijiji cha pwani chenye utamaduni wa wenyeji, matembezi ya ufukweni na uzoefu wa maisha ya Zanzibar.
description_en: Jambiani is a coastal village for local culture, beach walks, and quieter Zanzibar life.
tips: Good for cultural stays; respect local dress near villages.

name: Spice Farm Tour
description_sw: Ziara ya mashamba ya viungo huonyesha karafuu, mdalasini, pilipili manga na historia ya Zanzibar kama kisiwa cha viungo.
description_en: Spice farm tours show cloves, cinnamon, pepper, and Zanzibar’s spice-island history.
tips: Go with a licensed guide; buy spices only if quality and price are clear.
keywords: spice farm cloves cinnamon spice tour

name: House of Wonders
description_sw: Beit-al-Ajaib ni moja ya majengo maarufu ya kihistoria katika Stone Town, karibu na Forodhani.
description_en: The House of Wonders is one of Stone Town’s iconic historic buildings near Forodhani.
tips: Check current opening/restoration status before visiting.
keywords: house of wonders beit al ajaib museum heritage

name: Serengeti National Park
description_sw: Serengeti ni hifadhi maarufu duniani kwa uhamaji wa nyumbu, simba na safari za wanyama pori.
description_en: Serengeti is famous for the wildebeest migration, lions, and wildlife safaris.
tips: Requires flight/long road trip from Zanzibar; plan with safari operator.

name: Mount Kilimanjaro
description_sw: Mlima Kilimanjaro ni mlima mrefu zaidi Afrika na kivutio kikubwa kwa wapandaji.
description_en: Mount Kilimanjaro is Africa’s highest mountain and a major trekking destination.
tips: Book through licensed operators; allow several days for acclimatization.

name: Ngorongoro Crater
description_sw: Ngorongoro ni kreta kubwa yenye wanyama pori wengi na mandhari ya kipekee.
description_en: Ngorongoro Crater is a large crater with abundant wildlife and distinctive landscapes.
tips: Often combined with Serengeti; book permits/accommodation early.

name: Dar es Salaam
description_sw: Dar es Salaam ni jiji kubwa la biashara, bandari na njia kuu ya kuingia Tanzania.
description_en: Dar es Salaam is Tanzania’s major commercial city, port, and transport gateway.
tips: Useful for flights, ferries to Zanzibar, embassies, and shopping.
keywords: dar es salaam city ferry airport port

name: Dodoma
description_sw: Dodoma ni mji mkuu wa Tanzania na kituo cha serikali.
description_en: Dodoma is Tanzania’s capital and government center.
tips: Useful for official visits; not a primary beach/safari destination.
